title: POWERful Crossbows
description:
Tired of crossbows being useless? 
Well now they aren't!  With this datapack, Crossbows can be enchanted with both Breach and Power!
body:
## BETTER CROSSBOWS, REBORN!

### This datapack/mod allows Crossbows to be enchanted with both Breach and Power

### For support, join the Discord: [https://discord.gg/6YXSnQw8Uf](https://discord.gg/6YXSnQw8Uf)
